posts.text: Hi everyone, just checking in! If anyone needs help with account access or payment updates, please DM me directly via [link removed] and I'll sort it out for you. #accounthelp #support
posts.explanation: This is a clear credential-harvesting attempt as the author explicitly requests passwords or security codes through a link.
